finding_results.notes: Compressed the invoice reveal into one explicit articulation of the forced-labor mechanism, then redirected the scene into copying urgency. Reworked the close so Marisol's emptied tote, hidden receipt, and need to get back under Teresa's eye provide fresh consequence instead of another abstract restatement.
finding_results.summary: The chapter now names the scheme once at the reveal and ends on immediate tactical fallout rather than repeating the same discovery in new terms.

summary: Addressed the prose/copyedit finding by tightening the reveal language and sharpening the ending around physical and operational consequence.
